product.title: Squad Dunk
product.description: Squad Dunk is a physics-based first-person basketball game. Team up with friends for casual or competitive matches. No auto-aim. Every play, good or terrible, is yours. Ready to make basketball physical?
product.history: Squad Dunk is basketball built around physics. Each player controls one character on the court, teaming up with friends in casual or competitive online matches across courts with their own twists. No auto-aim, every play, good or terrible, is yours.

features.feature: Physics-based shots, passes, steals, and rebounds
Simple to start, plenty of room to improve
Different courts and scenarios, each with its own twist
An unpaid referee in constant danger

product.development: In active development by Katapult Games.
product.developers: Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini and Anahi Mou

press-kit-link.label: Click here for Press Kit Link

product.short-description: Squad Dunk is a physics-based first-person basketball game. Team up with friends for casual or competitive matches. No auto-aim. Every play, good or terrible, is yours. Ready to make basketball physical?

long-descriptions.long-description: Squad Dunk is basketball built around physics. Each player controls one character on the court, teaming up with friends in casual or competitive online matches across courts with their own twists. No auto-aim, every play, good or terrible, is yours.

key-feature.title: PLAY FROM THE COURT
key-feature.body: Control one player in first person and experience the match from inside the action, not from a distant camera.

key-feature.title: FEEL THE PHYSICS
key-feature.body: Squad Dunk uses physics-based mechanics to make basketball feel more alive, physical, and unpredictable. Blocks, shots, steals, rebounds, movement, and contact all become part of the moment.

key-feature.title: PLAY AS A TEAM
key-feature.body: Play solo or with friends in casual or competitive matches. Team up, give your squad a leg up, literally, and go for the kind of plays normal basketball would keep illegal, turning questionable ideas into real plays.

key-feature.title: EVERY COURT CHANGES THE GAME
key-feature.body: Each court adds its own twist, with new mechanics and environments that make teams adapt in different ways.

key-feature.title: CUSTOMIZE YOUR CHARACTER
key-feature.body: Create your look, build your squad identity, and give your team its own style.

product.localization-json:

Team up, give your squad a leg up, literally, and go for the kind of plays normal basketball would keep illegal, turning questionable ideas into real plays."},{"icon":"","title":"EVERY COURT CHANGES THE GAME","body":"Each court adds its own twist, with new mechanics and environments that make teams adapt in different ways."},{"icon":"","title":"CUSTOMIZE YOUR CHARACTER","body":"Create your look, build your squad identity, and give your team its own style."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Home","about":"About","press":"Press"},"eyebrow":"Gameplay Reel","tagline":"Physics-based first-person basketball. No auto-aim. Every play is yours.","play":"Watch Gameplay Reel","close":"Close video","fallback":"Open on YouTube"},"nav":{"language":"Language","menu":"Menu","sections":{"factsheet":"Factsheet","description":"Description","features":"Features","media":"Media","branding":"Branding","links":"Links","team":"Team","contact":"Contact"}},"factsheet":{"title":"Factsheet","labels":{"about":"About:","developer":"Developer:","development":"Development:","developers":"Developers:","publisher":"Publisher:","release_date":"Release date:","genres":"Genres:","platforms":"Platforms:","cost":"Cost:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"Trailer:","preview":"Pre-view:","press_kit":"Press Kit:","website":"Website:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"In active development by Katapult Games.","developers":"Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini and Anahi Mou","based_in":"Based in Berlin, Germany","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"Click here for Steam Link","trailer":"Click here for Trailer Link","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"Click here for Press Kit Link"}},"features":{"title":"Features","items":["First-person view","Physics-based shots, passes, steals, and rebounds","Up to 3 players per team","Simple to start, plenty of room to improve","Different courts and scenarios, each with its own twist","Character and team customization","An unpaid referee in constant danger"]},"media":{"title":"Media","videos":"Videos","screenshots":"Screenshots","download":"download press kit as .rar","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"Physics-based first-person basketball gameplay preview.","label":"Watch on YouTube"},{"title":"Reveal Trailer","description":"Coming soon.","label":"Coming soon"}]},"branding":{"title":"Branding","download":"download logo files as .zip"},"links":{"title":"Links"},"team":{"title":"Team","about_title":"About Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"About","boilerplate":"A small indie video game studio based in Berlin.
We are Katapult Games and we build games with our community, not just for them. Driven by transparency, flexibility and a love for modern gaming trends, our mission is to create high energy multiplayer experiences that truly connect with players. We don't just want you to play our games, we want you to help us shape them. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Team","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Contact","email":"Email","bug_reports":"Bug Reports"}}},"es":{},"ru":{},"ja":{"description":{"heading":"SQUAD DUNKとは？","short":{"title":"ショート説明","text":"Squad Dunkは、物理ベースの一人称視点バスケットボールゲームです。友達とチームを組み、カジュアルまたは競技的な試合を楽しめます。オートエイムはありません。良いプレイもひどいプレイも、すべてあなた自身のものです。バスケットボールをもっとフィジカルにする準備はできていますか？"},"long":{"title":"ロング説明","paragraphs":["Squad Dunkは、物理を中心に作られたバスケットボールです。各プレイヤーはコート上の1人のキャラクターを操作し、友達とチームを組んで、それぞれ独自の仕掛けを持つコートでカジュアルまたは競技的なオンラインマッチをプレイします。オートエイムはありません。良いプレイもひどいプレイも、すべてあなた自身のものです。"]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"主な特徴","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"コートの中からプレイ","body":"遠くのカメラではなく、一人称視点で1人の選手を操作し、アクションの内側から試合を体験します。"},{"icon":"","title":"物理を感じる","body":"物理ベースのメカニクスにより、ブロック、シュート、スティール、リバウンド、移動、接触のすべてが、その瞬間のプレイに影響します。"},{"icon":"","title":"チームでプレイ","body":"ソロでも友達とでも、カジュアルまたは競技的な試合を遊べます。チームを組み、普通のバスケットボールなら反則になりそうなアイデアを本物のプレイに変えましょう。"},{"icon":"","title":"コートごとにゲームが変わる","body":"それぞれのコートには独自の仕掛け、メカニクス、環境があり、チームは状況に合わせてプレイを変える必要があります。"},{"icon":"","title":"キャラクターをカスタマイズ","body":"自分の見た目を作り、スクワッドの個性を築き、チーム独自のスタイルを与えましょう。"}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"ホーム","about":"概要","press":"プレス"},"eyebrow":"ゲームプレイリール","tagline":"物理ベースの一人称視点バスケットボール。オートエイムなし。すべてのプレイはあなたのもの。","play":"ゲームプレイリールを見る","close":"動画を閉じる","fallback":"YouTubeで開く"},"nav":{"language":"言語","menu":"メニュー","sections":{"factsheet":"ファクトシート","description":"説明","features":"特徴","media":"メディア","branding":"ブランディング","links":"リンク","team":"チーム","contact":"連絡先"}},"factsheet":{"title":"ファクトシート","labels":{"about":"概要:","developer":"開発:","development":"開発状況:","developers":"開発者:","publisher":"パブリッシャー:","release_date":"発売日:","genres":"ジャンル:","platforms":"プラットフォーム:","cost":"価格:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"トレーラー:","preview":"プレビュー:","press_kit":"プレスキット:","website":"ウェブサイト:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"Katapult Gamesが現在開発中。","developers":"Bruno Braghetto、Matias Nicolini、Anahi Mou","based_in":"ドイツ・ベルリン拠点","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"Steamリンクはこちら","trailer":"トレーラーリンクはこちら","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"プレスキットリンクはこちら"}},"features":{"title":"特徴","items":["一人称視点","物理ベースのシュート、パス、スティール、リバウンド","1チーム最大3人","始めやすく、上達の余地がたっぷり","それぞれ独自の仕掛けを持つさまざまなコートとシナリオ","キャラクターとチームのカスタマイズ","常に危険にさらされる無給の審判"]},"media":{"title":"メディア","videos":"動画","screenshots":"スクリーンショット","download":"プレスキットを.rarでダウンロード","video_cards":[{"title":"プレビュー","description":"物理ベースの一人称視点バスケットボールのゲームプレイプレビュー。","label":"YouTubeで見る"},{"title":"リビールトレーラー","description":"近日公開。","label":"近日公開"}]},"branding":{"title":"ブランディング","download":"ロゴファイルを.zipでダウンロード"},"links":{"title":"リンク"},"team":{"title":"チーム","about_title":"Katapult Gamesについて","boilerplate_title":"概要","boilerplate":"ベルリンを拠点とする小さなインディーゲームスタジオです。
私たちはKatapult Gamesです。私たちはコミュニティのためだけでなく、コミュニティと一緒にゲームを作ります。透明性、柔軟性、現代のゲームトレンドへの愛を大切にし、プレイヤーと本当に繋がる高エネルギーなマルチプレイヤー体験を目指しています。私たちはただ遊んでもらうだけでなく、一緒に形作ってほしいと考えています。Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"チーム","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"連絡先","email":"メール","bug_reports":"バグ報告"}}},"zh":{},"de":{"description":{"heading":"WAS IST SQUAD DUNK?","short":{"title":"KURZBESCHREIBUNG","text":"Squad Dunk ist ein physikbasiertes First-Person-Basketballspiel. Spiele mit Freundinnen und Freunden in lockeren oder kompetitiven Matches. Kein Auto-Aim. Jeder Spielzug, gut oder katastrophal, gehört dir. Bereit, Basketball körperlicher zu machen?"},"long":{"title":"LANGE BESCHREIBUNG","paragraphs":["Squad Dunk ist Basketball, der rund um Physik gebaut ist. Jede Person steuert einen Charakter auf dem Court und spielt mit Freundinnen und Freunden in lockeren oder kompetitiven Online-Matches auf Courts mit eigenen Twists. Kein Auto-Aim, jeder Spielzug, gut oder katastrophal, gehört dir."]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"Hauptfeatures","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"SPIEL DIREKT VOM COURT","body":"Steuere einen Spieler in der First-Person-Perspektive und erlebe das Match mitten aus der Action heraus, nicht aus einer entfernten Kamera."},{"icon":"","title":"SPÜRE DIE PHYSIK","body":"Physikbasierte Mechaniken machen Basketball lebendiger, körperlicher und unvorhersehbarer. Blocks, Würfe, Steals, Rebounds, Bewegung und Kontakt werden Teil jedes Moments."},{"icon":"","title":"SPIEL ALS TEAM","body":"Spiele solo oder mit Freundinnen und Freunden in lockeren oder kompetitiven Matches. Arbeitet zusammen und verwandelt fragwürdige Ideen in echte Spielzüge."},{"icon":"","title":"JEDER COURT VERÄNDERT DAS SPIEL","body":"Jeder Court bringt eigene Twists, Mechaniken und Umgebungen mit, an die sich Teams auf unterschiedliche Weise anpassen müssen."},{"icon":"","title":"PASSE DEINEN CHARAKTER AN","body":"Erstelle deinen Look, baue eine Squad-Identität auf und gib deinem Team einen eigenen Stil."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Home","about":"Über das Spiel","press":"Presse"},"eyebrow":"Gameplay-Reel","tagline":"Physikbasierter First-Person-Basketball. Kein Auto-Aim. Jeder Spielzug gehört dir.","play":"Gameplay-Reel ansehen","close":"Video schließen","fallback":"Auf YouTube öffnen"},"nav":{"language":"Sprache","menu":"Menü","sections":{"factsheet":"Factsheet","description":"Beschreibung","features":"Features","media":"Medien","branding":"Branding","links":"Links","team":"Team","contact":"Kontakt"}},"factsheet":{"title":"Factsheet","labels":{"about":"Über:","developer":"Entwickler:","development":"Entwicklung:","developers":"Entwickler:","publisher":"Publisher:","release_date":"Veröffentlichung:","genres":"Genres:","platforms":"Plattformen:","cost":"Preis:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"Trailer:","preview":"Pre-view:","press_kit":"Press Kit:","website":"Website:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"In aktiver Entwicklung bei Katapult Games.","developers":"Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini und Anahi Mou","based_in":"Sitz in Berlin, Deutschland","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"Hier zum Steam-Link","trailer":"Hier zum Trailer-Link","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"Hier zum Press-Kit-Link"}},"features":{"title":"Features","items":["First-Person-Perspektive","Physikbasierte Würfe, Pässe, Steals und Rebounds","Bis zu 3 Spielerinnen und Spieler pro Team","Leicht zu starten, mit viel Raum zur Verbesserung","Verschiedene Courts und Szenarien, jeweils mit eigenem Twist","Charakter- und Team-Anpassung","Ein unbezahlter Schiedsrichter in ständiger Gefahr"]},"media":{"title":"Medien","videos":"Videos","screenshots":"Screenshots","download":"Press Kit als .rar herunterladen","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"Physikbasierte First-Person-Basketball-Gameplay-Preview.","label":"Auf YouTube ansehen"},{"title":"Reveal-Trailer","description":"Bald verfügbar.","label":"Bald verfügbar"}]},"branding":{"title":"Branding","download":"Logodateien als .zip herunterladen"},"links":{"title":"Links"},"team":{"title":"Team","about_title":"Über Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"Über uns","boilerplate":"Ein kleines Indie-Videospielstudio mit Sitz in Berlin.
Wir sind Katapult Games und wir entwickeln Spiele mit unserer Community, nicht nur für sie. Angetrieben von Transparenz, Flexibilität und einer Liebe für moderne Gaming-Trends wollen wir energiegeladene Multiplayer-Erlebnisse schaffen, die Spielerinnen und Spieler wirklich verbinden. Wir möchten nicht nur, dass ihr unsere Spiele spielt, sondern dass ihr helft, sie mitzugestalten. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Team","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Kontakt","email":"E-Mail","bug_reports":"Bug Reports"}}},"fr":{},"pt":{}}}

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 01
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk first-person basketball gameplay screenshot.

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 02
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk multiplayer basketball gameplay screenshot.

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 03
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk physics-based basketball gameplay screenshot.

team.boilerplate: A small indie video game studio based in Berlin. We are Katapult Games and we build games with our community, not just for them. Driven by transparency, flexibility and a love for modern gaming trends, our mission is to create high energy multiplayer experiences that truly connect with players. We don't just want you to play our games, we want you to help us shape them. Welcome to the squad!
